title: Prologue
summary: The alchemist reads a re-told legend of Narcissus, in which the lake weeps for Narcissus not because of his beauty, but because it reflected its own beauty in his eyes. The alchemist finds the story lovely.

title: Part One
summary: Santiago, a young Andalusian shepherd, settles his flock for the night in an abandoned church. He reflects on a recurring dream and his two years as a shepherd. He recalls meeting a merchant's daughter the previous year in a village, a girl with whom he shared a pleasant conversation and felt an unprecedented desire to stay in one place.
